title: Lysakia rostrata
taxonomy: Lysakia rostrata is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. This family consists of over 1,400 species of flowering plants, commonly known as African violets, gloxinias, and streptocarpus. The genus Lysakia is a small group of plants within this family, with only a few species recognized. Further classification of Lysakia rostrata within the family Gesneriaceae is not well-documented and may require further research.
